label: Improved
items: Pl@ntNet's best match now always appears as its own clickable tile, even when the score is low or the AI happens to suggest the same species — so you can always see Pl@ntNet's verdict and confidence and click straight through to the care guide and grow guide. Two tiles for the same plant from different sources is now intentional: each shows its own confidence so you can decide which one to trust.

The "Pl@ntNet didn't return a match" note now only appears when Pl@ntNet genuinely returned zero candidates (e.g. the photo was rejected as non-plant or the service was unavailable). When Pl@ntNet returned even a low-confidence guess, the tile is shown above with a red percentage chip and the note is suppressed.
